name: ocas-vesper
description: Daily briefing generator. Aggregates signals from across the system into concise morning and evening briefings. Surfaces outcomes, opportunities, and decisions in natural language without exposing internal processes. Trigger phrases: 'give me my morning briefing', 'what happened today', 'what decisions need attention'. Do not use for deep research (Sift), pattern analysis (Corvus), or message drafting (Dispatch).
author: Indigo Karasu
